title: Nâng cấp Hệ thống Giám sát Nhà máy
desc:
Tiêu đề: Tuyển Kỹ sư Tự động hóa / Lập trình SCADA & IoT – Dự án Nâng cấp Hệ thống Giám sát Nhà máy Nước (Hà Nội)Ngân sách dự án: 30.000.000 VNĐ – 50.000.000 VNĐ (Tùy theo năng lực và khối lượng đảm nhiệm)Hình thức làm việc: On-site tại Hà Nội khi cần thiết.Mô tả công việc (Project Nhỏ):
Chúng tôi đang triển khai giai đoạn chuẩn bị kỹ thuật và làm Prototype cho dự án nâng cấp hệ thống điều hành tập trung của mạng lưới nhà máy nước. Phạm vi công việc của gói freelancer này bao gồm:  Nghiên cứu cấu trúc dữ liệu, kết nối và lập trình thử nghiệm thu thập dữ liệu (Analog & Digital Tags) từ 01 trạm PLC hiện hữu (Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm với Siemens S7-1200/1500 hoặc Phoenix Contact ILC) về Gateway trung tâm.  Cấu hình truyền thông dữ liệu qua giao thức Modbus TCP/IP hoặc MQTT kết nối với Broker tập trung.  Thiết kế thử nghiệm 02 giao diện giám sát (Dashboard hiển thị lưu lượng, áp lực, mức nước động/tĩnh của giếng) chạy trên nền tảng Web/Mobile Client (Ưu tiên ứng viên biết dùng Ignition SCADA hoặc các tool Open-source như Grafana/Node-RED).  Yêu cầu kỹ năng (Skills Required):Có kinh nghiệm thực tế làm việc với hệ thống SCADA/PLC trong ngành Nước sạch / Xử lý nước thải (Water & Wastewater).Thành thạo lập trình PLC Siemens (TIA Portal v13-v18) hoặc Phoenix Contact (PcWorX).  Hiểu sâu về các giao thức truyền thông công nghiệp: Modbus TCP, MQTT, OPC UA.  Điểm cộng lớn nếu đã từng làm việc với Ignition SCADA (Perspective Module) hoặc có chứng chỉ của Inductive University.Có khả

title: Realtor Virtual Assistant Support -- 2
desc:
Please watch this 

HELP ME ORGANIZE MY CRM: (GoHighLevel) 
https://www.loom.com/share/24b1f665f22842c9996d907503c54b52

HELP ME GET MORE LEASE LEADS: 
https://www.loom.com/share/a82d491dc92d45728822b4b6b658699b




This is a DUAL compensation role: 

1.  Project-based (i.e. I'll pay you to set things up in Go High Level) 
2.  Commission-based - the more leads you get, the more you get paid. 
Please don't answer the ad if you're not ok with that. 



I’m looking for a reliable virtual assistant who can keep my real-estate workflow running smoothly. Day to day you’ll be posting new property listings on Zumper, Facebook Marketplace, and Zillow, then jumping into my Go High Level CRM to clean up, tag, and segment incoming leads so every prospect is easy to track.  


**Responsibilities**

* Create and maintain your own accounts on platforms such as Zumper & PadMapper

* Post and manage rental property advertisements using your own platform accounts (not the realtor's accounts).

* Copy & past listing info directly from Realtor.ca (I'll provide you with the lease listing addresses) 

* Copy information from existing listings and accurately recreate/repost ads on approved platforms. (I'll provide you with the PARAMATERS with which you can search these leads, YOU will be the one to do it) 

* Monitor active ads and notify(+) the realtor of inquiries, issues, or removed listings.
+ "Notify" means: "set up an automated system whereby the leads end up in my CRM"

* Maintain organized

title: Real Estate Lead Gen Campaign
desc:
I need a sharp, data-driven performance marketer to bring in a steady stream of qualified real-estate leads for a new project in Gurgaon. The focus is purely on lead generation, so every click and impression must be engineered to capture details of buyers actively looking for residential property in this micro-market.

Channels in play:
• Meta (Facebook & Instagram) for highly targeted location and interest ads.  
• Google Search & YouTube to catch high-intent queries and retarget site visitors.  
• WhatsApp for instant lead nurturing once prospects engage.

I’m open to integrating email sequences as well if it helps move prospects further down the funnel, but the core effort should sit on paid social and search.

Here’s what I’m looking for from you:
1. A concise funnel strategy that connects campaign objectives, creatives, landing pages, and WhatsApp follow-ups.  
2. Audience setup with Gurgaon-specific geo-fencing, look-alike and intent keywords.  
3. Compelling ad copy, creatives, and A/B testing plans.  
4. Daily optimisation with clear metrics (CPL, CTR, conversion rate) and transparent reporting.  
5. Pixel, GA4, and offline event tracking so we can attribute every lead accurately.

Success is simple: a consistent flow of genuine property enquiries delivered at an efficient cost per lead.

If you have a proven track record of similar real-estate campaigns and can start right away, let’s discuss next steps and timelines.

title: Excel Dashboards & Retention Metrics Analysis -- 2
desc:
I need an Advanced Excel specialist to turn raw campaign data into an interactive retention dashboard that spotlights performance metrics—specifically conversion rates. My files already contain the necessary transactional and engagement logs; what I’m missing is a clean, automated way to track how each cohort converts over time and to surface insights I can act on immediately.

Here’s what the finished work should let me do:  

• Open one workbook and, through slicers or drop-downs, filter by channel, segment, or date range to see real-time conversion performance.  
• Compare current conversion rates against historical benchmarks, with clear visual cues when a metric slips or surpasses target.  
• Drill down from a summary view to individual campaign details without breaking formulas or formatting.  

Power Query or VBA can be used if it keeps data refresh frictionless; PivotTables, Power Pivot, and dynamic charts are all welcome so long as the file stays lightweight and shareable. I’m working on tight timelines, so I’d like the first workable version delivered ASAP, then we can iterate once or twice for polish.

Send a brief outline of how you would structure the workbook and an example of a past dashboard that tracks conversion metrics—screenshots are fine. The sooner we can sync, the faster I can roll these insights into our next retention push.

title: Wishlink and Instagram Content Linking
desc:
# Project Brief: Wishlink Profile Setup and Instagram Product Linking

## Project Overview

I am looking for a Wishlink creator or manager who can set up and manage my Wishlink profile from scratch.

The project involves reviewing my Instagram content and correctly linking all relevant products featured across my stories, reels, posts, highlights, and older content.

The objective is to create a well-organised, fully functional Wishlink storefront that makes it easy for my audience to discover and purchase the products I genuinely use, wear, recommend, or feature in my content.

## Scope of Work

### 1. Wishlink Profile Setup

Set up and optimise my complete Wishlink creator profile, including:

* Profile image and creator information
* Bio and profile description
* Category selection
* Social media integration
* Payment and account setup guidance, wherever required
* Storefront organisation
* Relevant collections and product categories
* Profile optimisation for better discoverability and conversions

### 2. Instagram Content Audit

Review my Instagram profile thoroughly, including:

* Existing reels
* Feed posts
* Carousels
* Story highlights
* Older stories saved within highlights
* Travel, lifestyle, beauty, fashion, home, pet and everyday-use content

The creator must identify every product that can be linked or monetised through Wishlink.

### 3. Product Identification and Linking

For every relevant Instagram story, reel or post:

* Identify the exact or closest availa

title: Monthly GST Filing & Statements
desc:
I’m looking for someone who can take complete charge of my GST compliance month after month. Using the data maintained in Tally, you will:

• Prepare and file GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B for every tax period, ensuring all outward and inward supplies reconcile perfectly with the portal.  
• Compile the full set of annual financial statements—profit & loss, balance sheet and cash-flow—so they align seamlessly with future GSTR-9/9C requirements.

Accuracy and timeliness are non-negotiable; any mismatch reports must be cleared before submission, and I expect prompt communication if supporting vouchers are missing. Remote access to Tally can be arranged, or I can forward clean exports—whichever workflow you prefer.

If you have prior experience replying to ASMT-10 notices, let me know, as that could become an additional assignment once the regular filings are running smoothly.

title: High-Power Class D Audio Amplifier
desc:
I need a Class D audio amplifier with tone control Bass Treble designed for professional audio equipment. The amplifier should deliver a power output between 100W to 500W.

Key Requirements:
- Input Support: XLR and RCA
- Power Output: 100W to 500W
- Suitable for professional audio applications

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Expertise in designing Class D amplifiers
- Experience with professional audio equipment
- Knowledge of XLR and RCA input integration
- Proven track record in high-power audio amplifier projects

Please provide portfolios and relevant experience.

title: Panduan Tertulis Game Simulator
desc:
Saya ingin sebuah panduan tertulis lengkap yang menjelaskan cara memainkan sebuah permainan video ber-genre simulator. Fokus saya adalah:

• Struktur langkah-demi-langkah sejak menu awal hingga fitur lanjutan  
• Penjelasan kontrol, antarmuka, serta mekanik inti simulator  
• Tips efisien untuk progres cepat, manajemen sumber daya, dan penyelesaian tantangan umum  
• Ringkasan istilah atau ikon penting agar pembaca baru tidak bingung  

Gaya penulisan harus jelas, ramah, dan mudah dipindai—gunakan heading singkat, poin-poin, dan contoh situasi in-game. Pastikan panduan dapat diikuti pemain pemula sekaligus memberi wawasan tambahan bagi pengguna berpengalaman.

Keluaran yang saya butuhkan: file dokumen (Word atau Google Docs) siap diedit. Jika Anda terbiasa menyertakan tangkapan layar atau diagram sederhana guna memperjelas penjelasan, silakan tambahkan; namun fokus utama tetap pada teks berkualitas.  

Tunjukkan pengalaman Anda menulis panduan game, terutama untuk judul simulator, dan lampirkan contoh pekerjaan serupa bila ada.

title: Comprehensive Multi-Lingual Document Translation -- 6
desc:
*****If not able to comply with requirements to bid on project please refrain from doing so****I am looking for skillful translators agency with capability to handle multiple pairs (99+) to translate on ongoing basis , long term job, an assortment of documents from English to multi- language pairs. The translations include languages such as Spanish, Vietnamese, Korean, Arabic, Nepali, Amharic, Chinese, Russian, and others. Moreover, the ability to provide Desktop Publishing (DTP) services is a vital requirement. 
The scope of documents that need translating encompasses legal papers, technical manuals and general content. Thus, experience in technical and legal translation is highly crucial. 

In your application:

- Please give a detailed project proposal outlining per word rate for the specific pair, for:
-----General translation
-----Technical translation
------Rush orders if there is a price difference and turn around time
- Highlight your past work, particularly in legal and technical areas.
- Showcase your expertise in the languages stated above.
- Be able to provide virtual remote /phone interpreting for the different pairs including technical interpretations

This project calls for translators who can accurately convey the meaning of the source text, keeping in mind cultural associations and nuances. ****no machine translations nor google or any other non human translations.***

title: Traducción documento legal inglés-español
desc:
Necesito la versión en español de un documento oficial redactado en inglés. El texto se publicará con fines legales, por lo que requiero una traducción totalmente precisa, con terminología jurídica adecuada y tono formal. No es necesaria ninguna certificación oficial, solo una traducción fiel y clara.

Entrego el archivo original en Word y espero recibir:
• Traducción completa en Word y PDF.  
• Formato conservando encabezados, numeración y tablas tal como aparecen en el original.  
• Uso coherente de vocabulario legal para evitar ambigüedades.

El trabajo debe entregarse en un plazo máximo de una hora desde la adjudicación. Mantén absoluta confidencialidad sobre el contenido y, si tienes dudas terminológicas, coméntamelas antes de cerrar la versión final.

title: Female Influencer – Accounting Reels
desc:
I’m growing two new social channels—TikTok and Instagram Reels—dedicated to promoting my accounting firm, and I’m looking for a confident female creator who can speak clear, fluent English on-camera.  

Here’s what I need: short, punchy vertical videos that make accounting services feel approachable and professional. Think 30-60 second clips that introduce our brand, highlight limited-time offers, or tease an upcoming webinar rather than deep technical tutorials. I’ll provide the talking points or a loose script; you add your personality, record in good lighting with crisp audio, and deliver ready-to-post MP4 files.  

We’ll start with a small batch so we can fine-tune tone, pacing, and call-to-action style. If we both like the results, this can roll into a steady weekly schedule. Strong on-camera presence, the ability to pronounce basic accounting terms naturally, and access to simple editing tools (CapCut, InShot, or similar) will make the workflow smooth.  

Send a link to past on-camera work—preferably any promotional or professional pieces you’ve done—and let me know how quickly you can turn around the first three videos.
